six_eyes.title: Collect 6 or more of the 12 custom eyes — the midpoint of the Eye Hunt (check when reached)

know_portal.title: Understand the 9+3 portal structure — 9 custom eyes + 3 anchor eyes = 12 total for activation

subtitle.text: Nine civilizations. Three anchors. Twelve eyes. One portal. This is the full map of the hunt.

description: ▸ End Remastered replaces all 12 vanilla Eye of Ender
The portal requires any 12 unique eyes placed.
This quest is the complete reference for all 12.
Pin this. Come back to it.
'It sees nothing. Not darkness. Not blindness.'
Kukulkan (Call of Yucatan) — drops Fragment of Rebirth
'It was not lost. It was buried.'
'Objects that are very old remember being old.'
'It is order that has been misapplied.'
'The text was redacted by the academy.'
'Magic that was forced to be still.'
'The Cursed Eye was always the last one.'
Guaranteed drop — also Nether fortress loot fallback
(Fire anchor — the Revenant is the thermal record)
└ Eyes placed in portal frame (any order)
└ 20-minute re-entry delay after placing an eye
(avoid placing until you have all 12 ready)
└ Stronghold portal frame: use Antique Atlas to locate
The portal does not open when you find a place.
It opens when you find all the people
◇ The Cursed Eye (Ch12) uses the Manifestor Trap.
Read the Scarlet King scroll (Ch05) before Ch12.
The mechanic is intentional. Plan for it.
